<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## How to test

## Module Verify checklist
<!-- Paste the module's Verify steps and check them off -->
- [ ]

## Critical code check (required before merge)
- [ ] CI green (typecheck, lint, tests, build)
- [ ] `/code-review` completed and findings addressed (`high`/`ultra` for security/PII modules)
- [ ] `/security-review` run if this touches PII, the LLM layer, or the backend
- [ ] No secrets / API keys / resumes / PII committed
- [ ] Module Verify steps performed
